prerequisites: A Papersign account (Papersign is the e-signature product by Paperform).
A Developer API key generated in your Papersign Account Settings.

authMethods.name: API key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with the single secret field api_key. Papersign uses an API key passed in the HTTP Authorization header as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>) on every request. Generate the key as a Developer API key in your Papersign Account Settings.

setupSteps.title: Generate a Developer API key in Papersign
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your Papersign account and open Account Settings. In the Developer (API) settings, generate a new Developer API key. Copy the key value immediately and store it securely.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the generated key in the connector's required api_key field. This value is the credential the connector sends as Authorization: Bearer <api_key> with every API request to Papersign.

sources.title: Paperform API - Getting Started (authentication header and API key generation)
How can I connect Papersign with Zapier? (generate Developer API key in Papersign Account Settings)
